description: Product Description Ladies Chiffon Scarves Chiffon scarves available in various colours including Black, Navy, purple, Royal blue, Dark green, Burgundy, Fuchsia, Grey, White, Red, Blue, Light grey, Light purple, Light pink, Light blue and many more colour shades. Size: 150 x 45 cm / 59.1 x 17.8 inches (length x width) approx Chiffon scarves for women are perfect for any special occasion, parties, evening out, weddings, bridesmaids, bridal, proms, evening party or any other special events. Soft silk feel luxurious plain chiffon scarves for ladies, girls give a graceful look and add a finishing touch to any outfit. Chiffon scarf has elegant look & minimal style in women's scarves & wraps and looks great with any dress, drapes beautifully and can be used as scarf, neck scarf, girls headscarf, funeral scarfs, sheer wrap, head wrap, silk scarf, head scarf, sarong wrap, shawl, stole, neck wrap, chiffon hijab for girls, head wrap or muffler scarf. Great gift idea and must have accessory all year around. Women's fashionable chiffon scarves are perfect for yourself or gift to anyone as scarf or wrap. Chiffon scarfs for women are stylish, lightweight scarves, feels and look like silk scarf. Chiffon scarves are made from soft & adorable polyester (Chiffon) Best classic accessory for an evening out. Measurements may vary 3 – 5 cm Care: Hand wash recommended. Ironing only on low temperature settings. Package includes: 1 x Scarf Please note due to different screen resolution and brightness settings, colours may appear slightly different on your screen, depending on your screen size, display resolution and brightness settings.
